name: @pratibimba/kernel-bridge
description: First-loaded Theia extension that bridges the Pratibimba System frontend to the external Body/S/S0/epi-cli gate runtime (port 18794). Backend module connects via WebSocket/JSON-RPC; frontend publishes KernelBridgeAPI through Theia DI to downstream M-extensions, OmniPanel, and the agentic control room. Tracks Track 01 kernel_bridge_runtime.rs contract — KernelBridgeRuntimeEvent (ConnectionStatus | Readiness | Profile | Observability), KernelBridgeCachedProfile, KernelBridgeCapabilityRequest/Receipt with VAK context, lite/full subscription modes. Track 05 T3.
